title: coreopsis linifolia
intro: Coreopsis linifolia, also known as grass-leaved tickseed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its long, narrow leaves and yellow flowers with a distinctive black center. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Coreopsis linifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Coreopsis linifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
